source.rule: Round307 derives chapter, topic, task-type, source-material, and group ledgers only from existing repository JSON/text metadata. It does not read the protected local source folder and does not invent source facts.
source.publicBoundary: Output may include material ids, titles, groups, file-type labels, chapter/topic labels, task ids, route hints, and existing safe metadata only. It must not include protected paths, raw file handles, download URLs, or answer-evidence claims.
